title: hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. parvimaculatum
intro: Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. parvimaculatum, also known as a lesser Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits of Hieracium hypochoeroides subsp. parvimaculatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use in the form of infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken orally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
